overall.description: First-person exploration through a futuristic cyberpunk transit station and commercial plaza at night, featuring neon lighting, digital billboards, and NPC pedestrians. The player character descends from an upper level, traverses a concourse with digital signage, and ascends through Memorial Park to reach an outdoor urban street.

segments.scene_description: Walking through a spacious transit concourse with tiled floors and digital signage overhead. Large planters with trees line the right side while neon signs and advertisements illuminate the space. A security guard stands near the wall as pedestrians walk in opposing directions.

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends a wide concrete staircase toward a red-lit Gun-O-Rama sign, entering an upper walkway corridor. Large vertical billboards line the right wall alongside observation windows overlooking the lower concourse. The space is more enclosed with metal ceiling grates and artificial lighting.

segments.scene_description: Entering the spacious Memorial Park plaza with a high ceiling and a central palm tree. The area features a memorial wall with bronze plaques, digital billboards, and a pawn shop with green neon signage. Blue neon-lit stairs on the right lead upward toward the exit.

segments.scene_description: Ascending the blue neon-lit exit stairs, the camera emerges from the indoor facility onto a bustling outdoor urban street at night. The scene transitions from enclosed artificial lighting to open-air mixed lighting with street lamps, tall buildings, moving vehicles, and pedestrians carrying illuminated umbrellas.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that descends from a concrete stairwell into a vibrant transit concourse before ascending toward an enclosed upper walkway. It begins by moving down a set of stairs past lighting equipment, turning right into a corridor with illuminated ceilings. As the camera enters the spacious main concourse, the environment opens up into a wide area of tiled floors and neon advertisements, passing by large planters and pedestrians moving through the light. The scene then shifts as the camera ascends a wide concrete staircase toward a red-lit Gun-O-Rama sign, transitioning from the open plaza into a more confined upper corridor. Finally, the movement continues along a walkway lined with vertical billboards and metal ceiling grates, passing observation windows that look back down upon the lower levels.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the enclosed, neon-lit interior of a memorial plaza out into a bustling nocturnal cityscape. It begins within the spacious Memorial Park, gliding past a central palm tree, a bronze memorial wall, and a pawn shop marked by green neon signage. As the camera moves forward, the scene shifts toward a set of blue neon-lit stairs on the right that lead upward toward the exit. The perspective then ascends these stairs, transitioning from the artificial glow of the indoor facility to the open air of a vibrant urban street. Finally, the environment opens up to reveal a dense city landscape filled with tall buildings, moving vehicles, and pedestrians carrying illuminated umbrellas under the mixed light of street lamps.
